concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了6条假设，包括油箱容量16加仑、每周加油一次、每次选择加满或半箱、油箱不能为零、需求价格弹性短期缺乏弹性、消费者目标是最小化每英里成本。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumptions: 1) A gas tank holds 16 gallons and the average mileage is 25 miles/gallon. 2) The consumer has a choice to buy gas once a week ... 6) When deciding whether to fill up the tank, the consumers want to minimize cost per miles driven.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 论文建立了原油供应与汽油价格之间的线性回归关系，通过历史数据拟合得到校准常数β，用于将供应变化转化为价格变化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We use the retail gasoline prices in 2011 to solve for β and the average value is used for the General Pricing Model.

concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 论文引入随机变量ε模拟汽油价格的随机波动，类似于简化维纳过程，用于捕捉不可预测的随机运动。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We express this concept and its effects by introducing a random variable ε and allow to act like a simplified Wiener Process on the model.

concepts_used.title: 旅行商问题（TSP）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文构建了一个二叉树模型，将消费者每周的加油决策（加满或半箱）视为二叉树的节点，通过遍历所有可能的决策路径，计算每英里平均成本，从而选择最优策略。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We create a binary tree model based on the given assumptions and the results of the pricing model. This is the decision model.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用百分比误差（Percent Error）作为模型预测精度的评价指标，计算得到3.62%的误差，并绘制预测值与实际值的对比图。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Our percent error was 3.62% which is a very good result.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用了折线图展示预测价格与实际价格的对比，以及原油价格与汽油价格的相关性图，直观呈现模型效果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Here is a graph of our predicted price of 2012 and the actual price ... Here is a graph demonstrating our predicted price and the actual price.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文整体采用IMRaD结构：摘要（Problem Summary）、引言（Problem Summary and Analysis）、方法（Part I-IV）、结果（Results）、讨论（Letter）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We divided our solution into 5 parts: Part I) Establishing Preliminaries, Part II) The General Pricing Model, Part III) The Binary Tree Model, Part IV) The Boston Model, Part V) The Letter.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分清晰阐述了问题背景（汽油价格波动）、研究目标（帮助消费者决定每周购买量）以及论文结构概述。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The purpose of this paper is to develop a model that will attempt to predict and analyze retail gasoline prices so that a consumer could use it to determine how much gas to purchase on a given week.
